popularStory.headline: My Maternal 24th Great Grandfather, Eoghin MacGillemichael de Abernethy MacDuff
popularStory.description:
Name: Eoghin MacGillemichael de Abernethy MacDuff
Birth: about 1129 in Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland
Married: about 1149 in Scotland to Alfreka Abernethy
Children: (1)

zh.Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Eoghin MacGillemichael de Abernethy MacDuff於大約1129年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓時，他的父親Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife42歲，母親Countess Constance Buchan50歲。他於大約1149年與Alfreka Abernethy在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1150年在蘇格蘭培爾阿波內享年22歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭培爾。

zh-hans.Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland: 苏格兰哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eoghin MacGillemichael de Abernethy MacDuff于大约1129年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓时，他的父亲Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife42岁，母亲Countess Constance Buchan50岁。他于大约1149年与Alfreka Abernethy在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1150年在苏格兰培爾阿波內享年22岁，埋葬在苏格兰培爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Abernethy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Abernathy
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Abernethy in southeastern Perthshire. The placename is of Pictish origin, meaning ‘mouth of the river Nethy’.

History: This was the name of a cadet branch of MacDuff earls of Fife and one of the surnames of the Scots who settled in northern Ireland during the ‘plantation’ in the 17th century, and it was brought to the US as the name of a Southern plantation owner (in a different sense of the word ‘plantation’).

nameMeanings.name: MacDuff
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDuff
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Duibh, a patronymic from the personal name or byname Dubh ‘black, dark-haired, swarthy’. Compare Duff .

nameMeanings.name: Eoghin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name, supposedly derived from iúr ‘yew’ and meaning ‘born of yew’. It was borne in Irish legend by one of the two sons of Niall of the Nine Hostages.

variants.name: Euan
meanings: Anglicized form of Scottish Gaelic Eóghan, now also bestowed by parents without Scottish connections.

variants.name: Ewan
meanings: The usual Anglicized form in Scotland and Northern Ireland of Gaelic Eóghan . It is also found in northern England from the 14th century onwards, and since the late 1990s has been one of the Gaelic names that enjoy wider currency.

variants.name: Evan
meanings: As a Welsh name this represents an Anglicized form of Iefan , a later development of Ieuan . As a Scottish name it is a variant of Euan . It is now used throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Eoghin MacGillemichael de Abernethy MacDuff was born about 1129, in Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, his father, Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife, was 42 and his mother, Countess Constance Buchan, was 50. He married Alfreka Abernethy about 1149, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1150, in Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 22, and was buried in Perthshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eoghin MacGillemichael de Abernethy MacDuff est né environ 1129, à Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Countess Constance Buchan, avait 50 ans. Il a épousé Alfreka Abernethy environ 1149, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1150, à Abernethy, Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 22 ans, et a été enterré à Perthshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eoghin MacGillemichael de Abernethy MacDuff um 1129 in Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife 42 und seine Mutter Countess Constance Buchan 50. Er hat um 1149 in Scotland Alfreka Abernethy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1150 im Alter von 22 Jahren in Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland und wurde in Perthshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eoghin MacGillemichael de Abernethy MacDuff è nato il circa 1129 nel Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Countess Constance Buchan, aveva 50 anni. Lui sposato Alfreka Abernethy circa 1149, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1150, nel Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, all'età di 22 anni, e fu sepolto a Perthshire, Scotland.

ja.Methil, Fife, Scotland: スコットランドフィフメスイル
ja.Perthshire, Scotland: スコットランドペルスシュアイア
ja.Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland: スコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアハッドイントン
ja.Fife, Scotland: スコットランドフィフ
ja.Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland: スコットランドペルスシュアイアアバーネシー
ja.lifeSummary: Eoghin MacGillemichael de Abernethy MacDuffが約1129年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアハッドイントンで生まれた時，父Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fifeは42歳，母Countess Constance Buchanは50歳であった。約1149年にスコットランドでAlfreka Abernethyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1150年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアアバーネシーで22歳で死去し，スコットランドペルスシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eoghin MacGillemichael de Abernethy MacDuff(이)가 대략 1129년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 하딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Countess Constance Buchan(은)는 50세였다. 그는 대략 1149년 스컷랜드에서 Alfreka Abernethy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1150년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 압어네시에서 22세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eoghin MacGillemichael de Abernethy MacDuff nasceu aproximadamente 1129, em Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Countess Constance Buchan, tinha 50 anos. Ele casou-se com Alfreka Abernethy aproximadamente 1149, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1150, em Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, com 22 anos, e foi sepultado em Perthshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eoghin MacGillemichael de Abernethy MacDuff родился около 1129 г. в местности хаддингтон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Countess Constance Buchan, 50. Он женился на женщине по имени Alfreka Abernethy около 1149 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1150 г. в местности абирнети, пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 22 лет и был похоронен в местности пиртшир, Шотландия.

sm.from 1125 to 1179: mai le 1125 e o'o I le 1179

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eoghin MacGillemichael de Abernethy MacDuff nació aproximadamente 1129, en Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, su papá, Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Countess Constance Buchan, tenía 50 años. Se casó con Alfreka Abernethy aproximadamente 1149, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1150, en Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, a la edad de 22 años, y fue sepultado en Perthshire, Scotland.
